assignments.name: error
assignments.value: unknown command — valid: ci_runs, recent_commits, open_prs, read_file:<path>

parameters.query: INSERT INTO agent_trace_events (trace_id, session_id, turn_id, tool_name, tool_call_id, status, input_summary, started_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}', 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@', (SELECT max(id) FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@'), 'github_readonly', '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}', 'attempted', '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.input_summary_sql }}'::jsonb, now());

UPDATE agent_trace_events SET status = '{{ $json.ok ? "success" : "failed" }}', output_summary = jsonb_build_object('ok', {{ $json.ok ? "true" : "false" }}), error_message = {{ $json.ok ? "NULL" : "'tool returned ok:false'" }}, finished_at = now(), duration_ms = CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - started_at)) * 1000 AS INTEGER) WHERE tool_call_id = '{{ $('Mint Trace').first().json.tool_call_id }}';
